channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Miami-Dade deputies sue Damon and Affleck over depiction in Netflix film ‘The Rip’
item.description: Two Miami-Dade sheriff’s deputies, Jonathan Santana and Jason Smith, have filed a defamation lawsuit against actors Matt Damon and Ben Affleck and their production company, Artists Equity. The deputie...

item.title: Supreme Court allows continued access to mifepristone as legal challenge progresses
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Friday decided to maintain women's access to mifepristone, a drug commonly used for medical abortions, while a legal challenge continues. The court rejected lower-court restr...

item.title: Asteroid 2026 JH2 Will Pass Safely Near Earth on May 18
item.description: On May 18, 2026, asteroid 2026 JH2, roughly 20 meters (66 feet) in diameter—comparable to Chicago’s Cloud Gate sculpture—will make a close approach to Earth. The asteroid will pass at a minimum distan...

item.title: Kakenya Dreams Empowers Vulnerable Girls with Education and Healthcare Support
item.description: In Kenya's South Rift, Kakenya Dreams is transforming the lives of vulnerable girls from marginalised communities by providing quality education and healthcare. The programme, founded by Dr Kakenya Nt...

item.title: Financial adviser highlights the importance of insurance after life-threatening illness
item.description: In 2022, financial adviser Andrew Wolmarans experienced a sudden and severe medical emergency that left him in intensive care for nearly two months. Despite being fit and active, Wolmarans developed a...

item.title: House Prosecution Panel Prepares for Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial, Assigns Specific Grounds
item.description: The 11-member House prosecution panel is set to present the grounds for impeaching Vice President Sara Duterte as the Senate prepares to convene as an impeachment court. Bicol Saro party-list Represen...

item.title: The Caribou Trail: Exploring the Human Story of Newfoundland Soldiers at Gallipoli
item.description: The Caribou Trail, a collaboration between Montreal indie studios Unreliable Narrators and ManaVoid Entertainment, offers an immersive experience into the lives of Newfoundland soldiers during the Fir...

item.title: Impact of Abu-Bilal al-Manuki’s Death on ISWAP Operations in West Africa
item.description: The killing of Abu-Bilal al-Manuki, a top commander widely considered second-in-command of ISIS globally, by joint US and Nigerian forces, na major achievement for counter-terrorism in the Lake Chad r...

item.title: Colorado Secretary of State Criticizes Governor Polis for Commuting Sentence of Convicted Election Official
item.description: Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold publicly criticized Governor Jared Polis for commuting the sentence of Tina Peters, a former election official convicted of tampering with voting equipment. P...

item.title: U.S. and Nigerian Forces Kill Key Islamic State Leader in Lake Chad Basin Operation
item.description: U.S. and Nigerian forces conducted a joint operation in Nigeria that resulted in the death of Abu Bakr al-Mainuki, a senior leader of the Islamic State (IS) group in West Africa. Nigerian President Bo...

item.title: Israel-UAE Relations Remain Strategically Strong but Quiet
item.description: The relationship between Israel and the United Arab Emirates (UAE) is normally kept low-profile, but recent events have brought it to public attention. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu mentio...

item.title: Ogun Police Neutralise Two Kidnappers, Arrest Alleged Gang Leader
item.description: For Ogun State, police operatives don carry out serious operation against suspected kidnappers along Ijebu-Ode/Ibadan Road. The operation follow intelligence gathering on the kidnapping of three peopl...

item.title: REVFEST 2026 Showcases Ride Revolution Activities at Ayala Triangle Gardens
item.description: Ride Revolution is set to captivate fitness and cycling enthusiasts with the upcoming REVFEST 2026 at Ayala Triangle Gardens. This event promises a dynamic showcase of cycling activities, fitness prog...

item.title: Supreme Court Temporarily Maintains Telehealth Access to Mifepristone
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has temporarily allowed patients to continue receiving mifepristone, a key medication used for abortions, through telehealth and mail delivery. This decision comes after a lower...

item.title: Hamas military chief reportedly killed amid Israeli air strikes in Gaza
item.description: Mosques in northern Gaza have reported the death of Izz al-Din al-Haddad, commander of Hamas' military wing, following Israeli air strikes targeting him. Israeli authorities confirmed he was a key pla...

item.title: Lupita Nyong’o to Play Helen of Troy and Clytemnestra in Christopher Nolan’s Epic Film
item.description: Oscar-winning actress Lupita Nyong’o is coming back to the big screen in a major way. Director Christopher Nolan has confirmed that she will play not one but two of Greek mythology’s most famous women...

item.title: Joint U.S. and Nigerian Operation Kills Senior ISIS Leader Abu-Bilal al-Minuki
item.description: U.S. and Nigerian forces conducted a coordinated operation targeting a high-ranking leader of the Islamic State. President Donald Trump announced that the strike resulted in the death of Abu-Bilal al-...

item.title: Analysing Ramaphosa’s Response Amid the Phala Phala Controversy
item.description: In this edition of The Political Arena, journalists Lizeka Tandwa, Hajra Omarjee, Sibongakonke Shoba, and Kgothatso Madisa dissect the political turbulence surrounding President Cyril Ramaphosa follow...

item.title: Bali Offers Spiritual Renewal, Cultural Experiences and Warmth to Indian Tourists
item.description: Bali has become a favourite destination for Indian travellers seeking both adventure and spiritual peace. The island attracts newlyweds like Rajesh and Aarti from Delhi who enjoy beaches, water sports...

item.title: Komuravelli Railway Station Completed; Public Opening Expected Soon
item.description: Union Minister for Coal and Mines, G. Kishan Reddy, announced on Saturday, May 16, 2026, that the new railway station at Komuravelli has been completed and is expected to open for public use either in...
